revision.text:
{{Short description|Historical country in Japan}} {{Contains special characters}} {{nihongo|Shujukoku|侏儒国|しゅじゅこく}} is a country of [[Dwarf (mythology)|dwarves]] thought to be located south of [[Yamatai]]koku, which appears in [[History of China|Ancient China]]'s [[Book of the Later Han]] and [[Records of the Three Kingdoms]]. In [[Records of the Three Kingdoms|Wei Zhi]]. It is mentioned together with [[Black tooth country]] and Naked country.
== Overview == The following are listed in Chinese history books. [[Book of the Later Han]] and the so-called [[Wajinden|Wajin Biography]] in [[Records of the Three Kingdoms]] state that it is located 4,000 miles south of the queen state of [[Wakoku|Wa-koku]].
The [[Classic of Mountains and Seas|Shanhai Jing]], a document that precedes the [[Wajinden]], mentions an island called {{ill|Shojin|lt=Shojin-koku|ja|小人_(中国の伝説)}} in the eastern sea. The same book also mentions other dwarfs such as "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}", "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}", and "{{Nihongo|2=菌人}}" living in the east and south. The words "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}" and "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}" have the same pronunciation and etymology as {{Nihongo|2=侏儒}}, which is originally the same word.
== Wajinden == According to the [[Wajinden]]{{Quote frame|There is also a dwarf country in the south of it, the people are three or four feet long, to the queen more than 4,000 miles.}}
== [[Book of the Later Han]] == According to the [[Book of the Later Han]]{{Quote frame|More than 4,000 miles south of the Queen's country to Zhu Ru country, people are three or four feet long. From Zhu Ru southeast ship for a year, to the naked country, the black tooth country, so that the post transmission, the extreme is here.}}
== Main comparative sites ==
=== Tanegashima === {{Main|Tanegashima}} Many have identified [[Tanegashima]] with Shujukoku.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2">邪馬台国 [[石原洋三郎]] 令和元年10月 第一印刷P18-p23。</ref>。This is the result of a study of human bones excavated from Tanegashima Island from the Yayoi period to the Kofun period, with "extreme" short head, short head, and short stature characteristics<ref>種子島における古人骨形質の時代変化 竹中正巳 2009年。</ref> and that it is consistent with the anthropological characteristics of Shujukoku described in the [[wajinden]]. {{Citation needed span|This feature is not found in Okinawa, Kyushu, or Honshu, where human remains from the same period have been discovered, and "dwarf-like" adult human remains are found only on Tanegashima Island.|date=June 2022}}This is the reason why [[Tanegashima|Tanegashima Island]] is located in the south of Kyushu. [[Tanegashima]] is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some [[Yamatai Kyushu Theory|Yamatai Kyushu Theorists]] have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。
== References == {{Reflist}} <references group=""></references>
== See also ==
* {{ill|Shojin|lt=Shojin|ja|小人_(中国の伝説)}} * [[Sukunabikona]]、[[Issun-bōshi]] * [[Korpokkur]]
[[Category:Wajinden]] [[Category:Mythological places]] [[Category:States of the Wajinden]] [[Category:Pages with unreviewed translations]] {{Yamatai}}

The same book also mentions other dwarfs such as "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}", "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}", and "{{Nihongo|2=菌人}}" living in the east and south. The words "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}" and "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}" have the same pronunciation and etymology as {{Nihongo|2=侏儒}}, which is originally the same word.
== Wajinden == According to the [[Wajinden]]{{Quote frame|There is also a dwarf country in the south of it, the people are three or four feet long, to the queen more than 4,000 miles.}}
== [[Book of the Later Han]] == According to the [[Book of the Later Han]]{{Quote frame|More than 4,000 miles south of the Queen's country to Zhu Ru country, people are three or four feet long. From Zhu Ru southeast ship for a year, to the naked country, the black tooth country, so that the post transmission, the extreme is here.}}

=== Tanegashima === {{Main|Tanegashima}} Many have identified [[Tanegashima]] with Shujukoku.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2">邪馬台国 [[石原洋三郎]] 令和元年10月 第一印刷P18-p23。</ref>。This is the result of a study of human bones excavated from Tanegashima Island from the Yayoi period to the Kofun period, with "extreme" short head, short head, and short stature characteristics<ref>種子島における古人骨形質の時代変化 竹中正巳 2009年。</ref> and that it is consistent with the anthropological characteristics of Shujukoku described in the [[wajinden]]. {{Citation needed span|This feature is not found in Okinawa, Kyushu, or Honshu, where human remains from the same period have been discovered, and "dwarf-like" adult human remains are found only on Tanegashima Island.|date=June 2022}}This is the reason why [[Tanegashima|Tanegashima Island]] is located in the south of Kyushu. [[Tanegashima]] is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some [[Yamatai Kyushu Theory|Yamatai Kyushu Theorists]] have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。
== References == {{Reflist}} <references group=""></references>
== See also ==

revision.text:
{{Short description|Historical country in Japan}} {{Contains special characters}} {{nihongo|Shujukoku|侏儒国|しゅじゅこく}} is a country of [[Dwarf (mythology)|dwarves]] thought to be located south of [[Yamatai]]koku, which appears in [[History of China|Ancient China]]'s [[Book of the Later Han]] and [[Records of the Three Kingdoms]]. In [[Records of the Three Kingdoms|Wei Zhi]]. It is mentioned together with [[Black tooth country]] and Naked country.
== Overview == The following are listed in Chinese history books. [[Book of the Later Han]] and the so-called [[Wajinden|Wajin Biography]] in [[Records of the Three Kingdoms]] state that it is located 4,000 miles south of the queen state of [[Wakoku|Wa-koku]].
The [[Classic of Mountains and Seas|Shanhai Jing]], a document that precedes the [[Wajinden]], mentions an island called {{ill|Shojin|lt=Shojin-koku|ja|小人_(中国の伝説)}} in the eastern sea. The same book also mentions other dwarfs such as "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}", "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}", and "{{Nihongo|2=菌人}}" living in the east and south. The words "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}" and "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}" have the same pronunciation and etymology as {{Nihongo|2=侏儒}}, which is originally the same word.
== Wajinden == According to the [[Wajinden]]{{Quote frame|There is also a dwarf country in the south of it, the people are three or four feet long, to the queen more than 4,000 miles.}}
== [[Book of the Later Han]] == According to the [[Book of the Later Han]]{{Quote frame|More than 4,000 miles south of the Queen's country to Zhu Ru country, people are three or four feet long. From Zhu Ru southeast ship for a year, to the naked country, the black tooth country, so that the post transmission, the extreme is here.}}
== Main comparative sites ==
=== Tanegashima === {{Main|Tanegashima}} Many have identified [[Tanegashima]] with Shujukoku.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2">邪馬台国 [[石原洋三郎]] 令和元年10月 第一印刷P18-p23。</ref>。This is the result of a study of human bones excavated from Tanegashima Island from the Yayoi period to the Kofun period, with "extreme" short head, short head, and short stature characteristics<ref>種子島における古人骨形質の時代変化 竹中正巳 2009年。</ref> and that it is consistent with the anthropological characteristics of Shujukoku described in the [[wajinden]]. {{Citation needed span|This feature is not found in Okinawa, Kyushu, or Honshu, where human remains from the same period have been discovered, and "dwarf-like" adult human remains are found only on Tanegashima Island.|date=June 2022}}This is the reason why [[Tanegashima|Tanegashima Island]] is located in the south of Kyushu. [[Tanegashima]] is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some [[Yamatai Kyushu Theory|Yamatai Kyushu Theorists]] have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。
== References == {{Reflist}} <references group=""></references>
== See also ==
* {{ill|Shojin|lt=Shojin|ja|小人_(中国の伝説)}} * [[Sukunabikona]]、[[Issun-bōshi]] * [[Korpokkur]]

From Zhu Ru southeast ship for a year, to the naked country, the black tooth country, so that the post transmission, the extreme is here.}}
== Main comparative sites ==
=== Tanegashima === {{Main|Tanegashima}} Many have identified [[Tanegashima]] with Shujukoku.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2">邪馬台国 [[石原洋三郎]] 令和元年10月 第一印刷P18-p23。</ref>。This is the result of a study of human bones excavated from Tanegashima Island from the Yayoi period to the Kofun period, with "extreme" short head, short head, and short stature characteristics<ref>種子島における古人骨形質の時代変化 竹中正巳 2009年。</ref> and that it is consistent with the anthropological characteristics of Shujukoku described in the [[wajinden]]. {{Citation needed span|This feature is not found in Okinawa, Kyushu, or Honshu, where human remains from the same period have been discovered, and "dwarf-like" adult human remains are found only on Tanegashima Island.|date=June 2022}}This is the reason why [[Tanegashima|Tanegashima Island]] is located in the south of Kyushu. [[Tanegashima]] is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some [[Yamatai Kyushu Theory|Yamatai Kyushu Theorists]] have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。

revision.text:
{{Short description|Historical country in Japan}} {{Contains special characters}} {{nihongo|Shujukoku|侏儒国|しゅじゅこく}} is a country of [[Dwarf (mythology)|dwarves]] thought to be located south of [[Yamatai]]koku, which appears in [[History of China|Ancient China]]'s [[Book of the Later Han]] and [[Records of the Three Kingdoms]]. In [[Records of the Three Kingdoms|Wei Zhi]]. It is mentioned together with [[Black tooth country]] and Naked country.
== Overview == The following are listed in Chinese history books. [[Book of the Later Han]] and the so-called [[Wajinden|Wajin Biography]] in [[Records of the Three Kingdoms]] state that it is located 4,000 miles south of the queen state of [[Wakoku|Wa-koku]].
The [[Classic of Mountains and Seas|Shanhai Jing]], a document that precedes the [[Wajinden]], mentions an island called {{ill|Shojin|lt=Shojin-koku|ja|小人_(中国の伝説)}} in the eastern sea. The same book also mentions other dwarfs such as "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}", "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}", and "{{Nihongo|2=菌人}}" living in the east and south. The words "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}" and "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}" have the same pronunciation and etymology as {{Nihongo|2=侏儒}}, which is originally the same word.
== Wajinden == According to the [[Wajinden]]{{Quote frame|There is also a dwarf country in the south of it, the people are three or four feet long, to the queen more than 4,000 miles.}}
== [[Book of the Later Han]] == According to the [[Book of the Later Han]]{{Quote frame|More than 4,000 miles south of the Queen's country to Zhu Ru country, people are three or four feet long. [[Tanegashima]] is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some [[Yamatai Kyushu Theory|Yamatai Kyushu Theorists]] have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。

{{Short description|Historical country in Japan}} {{Contains special characters}} {{nihongo|Shujukoku|侏儒国|しゅじゅこく}} is a country of [[Dwarf (mythology)|dwarves]] thought to be located south of [[Yamatai]]koku, which appears in [[History of China|Ancient China]]'s [[Book of the Later Han]] and [[Records of the Three Kingdoms]]. In [[Records of the Three Kingdoms|Wei Zhi]]. It is mentioned together with [[Black tooth country]] and Naked country.
== Overview == The following are listed in Chinese history books. [[Book of the Later Han]] and the so-called [[Wajinden|Wajin Biography]] in [[Records of the Three Kingdoms]] state that it is located 4,000 miles south of the queen state of [[Wakoku|Wa-koku]].
The [[Classic of Mountains and Seas|Shanhai Jing]], a document that precedes the [[Wajinden]], mentions an island called {{ill|Shojin|lt=Shojin-koku|ja|小人_(中国の伝説)}} in the eastern sea. The same book also mentions other dwarfs such as "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}", "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}", and "{{Nihongo|2=菌人}}" living in the east and south. The words "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}" and "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}" have the same pronunciation and etymology as {{Nihongo|2=侏儒}}, which is originally the same word.
== Wajinden == According to the [[Wajinden]]{{Quote frame|There is also a dwarf country in the south of it, the people are three or four feet long, to the queen more than 4,000 miles.}}
== [[Book of the Later Han]] == According to the [[Book of the Later Han]]{{Quote frame|More than 4,000 miles south of the Queen's country to Zhu Ru country, people are three or four feet long. From Zhu Ru southeast ship for a year, to the naked country, the black tooth country, so that the post transmission, the extreme is here.}}
== Main comparative sites ==
=== Tanegashima === {{Main|Tanegashima}} Many have identified [[Tanegashima]] with Shujukoku.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2">邪馬台国 [[石原洋三郎]] 令和元年10月 第一印刷P18-p23。</ref>。This is the result of a study of human bones excavated from Tanegashima Island from the Yayoi period to the Kofun period, with "extreme" short head, short head, and short stature characteristics<ref>種子島における古人骨形質の時代変化 竹中正巳 2009年。</ref> and that it is consistent with the anthropological characteristics of Shujukoku described in the [[wajinden]]. {{Citation needed span|This feature is not found in Okinawa, Kyushu, or Honshu, where human remains from the same period have been discovered, and "dwarf-like" adult human remains are found only on Tanegashima Island.|date=June 2022}}This is the reason why [[Tanegashima|Tanegashima Island]] is located in the south of Kyushu. [[Tanegashima]] is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some [[Yamatai Kyushu Theory|Yamatai Kyushu Theorists]] have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。

{{Short description|Historical country in Japan}} {{Contains special characters}} {{nihongo|Shujukoku|侏儒国|しゅじゅこく}} is a country of [[Dwarf (mythology)|dwarves]] thought to be located south of [[Yamatai]]koku, which appears in [[History of China|Ancient China]]'s [[Book of the Later Han]] and [[Records of the Three Kingdoms]]. In [[Records of the Three Kingdoms|Wei Zhi]]. It is mentioned together with [[Black tooth country]] and Naked country.
== Overview == The following are listed in Chinese history books. [[Book of the Later Han]] and the so-called [[Wajinden|Wajin Biography]] in [[Records of the Three Kingdoms]] state that it is located 4,000 miles south of the queen state of [[Wakoku|Wa-koku]].
The [[Classic of Mountains and Seas|Shanhai Jing]], a document that precedes the [[Wajinden]], mentions an island called {{ill|Shojin|lt=Shojin-koku|ja|小人_(中国の伝説)}} in the eastern sea. The same book also mentions other dwarfs such as "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}", "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}", and "{{Nihongo|2=菌人}}" living in the east and south. The words "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}" and "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}" have the same pronunciation and etymology as {{Nihongo|2=侏儒}}, which is originally the same word.
== Wajinden == According to the [[Wajinden]]{{Quote frame|There is also a dwarf country in the south of it, the people are three or four feet long, to the queen more than 4,000 miles.}}
== [[Book of the Later Han]] == According to the [[Book of the Later Han]]{{Quote frame|More than 4,000 miles south of the Queen's country to Zhu Ru country, people are three or four feet long. From Zhu Ru southeast ship for a year, to the naked country, the black tooth country, so that the post transmission, the extreme is here.}}
== Main comparative sites ==
=== Tanegashima === {{Main|Tanegashima}} Many have identified [[Tanegashima]] with Shujukoku.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2">邪馬台国 [[石原洋三郎]] 令和元年10月 第一印刷P18-p23。</ref>。This is the result of a study of human bones excavated from Tanegashima Island from the Yayoi period to the Kofun period, with "extreme" short head, short head, and short stature characteristics<ref>種子島における古人骨形質の時代変化 竹中正巳 2009年。</ref> and that it is consistent with the anthropological characteristics of Shujukoku described in the [[wajinden]]. {{Citation needed span|This feature is not found in Okinawa, Kyushu, or Honshu, where human remains from the same period have been discovered, and "dwarf-like" adult human remains are found only on Tanegashima Island.|date=June 2022}}This is the reason why [[Tanegashima|Tanegashima Island]] is located in the south of Kyushu. [[Tanegashima]] is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some [[Yamatai Kyushu Theory|Yamatai Kyushu Theorists]] have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。

revision.text:
{{Short description|Historical country in Japan}} {{Contains special characters}} {{nihongo|Shujukoku|侏儒国|しゅじゅこく}} is a country of [[Dwarf (mythology)|dwarves]] thought to be located south of [[Yamatai]]koku, which appears in [[History of China|Ancient China]]'s [[Book of the Later Han]] and [[Records of the Three Kingdoms]]. In [[Records of the Three Kingdoms|Wei Zhi]]. It is mentioned together with [[Black tooth country]] and Naked country.
== Overview == The following are listed in Chinese history books. [[Book of the Later Han]] and the so-called [[Wajinden|Wajin Biography]] in [[Records of the Three Kingdoms]] state that it is located 4,000 miles south of the queen state of [[Wakoku|Wa-koku]].
The [[Classic of Mountains and Seas|Shanhai Jing]], a document that precedes the [[Wajinden]], mentions an island called {{ill|Shojin|lt=Shojin-koku|ja|小人_(中国の伝説)}} in the eastern sea. The same book also mentions other dwarfs such as "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}", "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}", and "{{Nihongo|2=菌人}}" living in the east and south. The words "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}" and "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}" have the same pronunciation and etymology as {{Nihongo|2=侏儒}}, which is originally the same word.
== Wajinden == According to the [[Wajinden]]{{Quote frame|There is also a dwarf country in the south of it, the people are three or four feet long, to the queen more than 4,000 miles.}}
== [[Book of the Later Han]] == According to the [[Book of the Later Han]]{{Quote frame|More than 4,000 miles south of the Queen's country to Zhu Ru country, people are three or four feet long. From Zhu Ru southeast ship for a year, to the naked country, the black tooth country, so that the post transmission, the extreme is here.}}
== Main comparative sites ==
=== Tanegashima === {{Main|Tanegashima}} Many have identified [[Tanegashima]] with Shujukoku.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2">邪馬台国 [[石原洋三郎]] 令和元年10月 第一印刷P18-p23。</ref>。This is the result of a study of human bones excavated from Tanegashima Island from the Yayoi period to the Kofun period, with "extreme" short head, short head, and short stature characteristics<ref>種子島における古人骨形質の時代変化 竹中正巳 2009年。</ref> and that it is consistent with the anthropological characteristics of Shujukoku described in the [[wajinden]]. {{Citation needed span|This feature is not found in Okinawa, Kyushu, or Honshu, where human remains from the same period have been discovered, and "dwarf-like" adult human remains are found only on Tanegashima Island.|date=June 2022}}This is the reason why [[Tanegashima|Tanegashima Island]] is located in the south of Kyushu. [[Tanegashima]] is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some [[Yamatai Kyushu Theory|Yamatai Kyushu Theorists]] have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。
== References == {{Reflist}} <references group=""></references>
== See also ==
* {{ill|Shojin|lt=Shojin|ja|小人_(中国の伝説)}} * [[Sukunabikona]]、[[Issun-bōshi]] * [[Korpokkur]]

== Overview == The following are listed in Chinese history books. [[Book of the Later Han]] and the so-called [[Wajinden|Wajin Biography]] in [[Records of the Three Kingdoms]] state that it is located 4,000 miles south of the queen state of [[Wakoku|Wa-koku]].
The [[Classic of Mountains and Seas|Shanhai Jing]], a document that precedes the [[Wajinden]], mentions an island called {{ill|Shojin|lt=Shojin-koku|ja|小人_(中国の伝説)}} in the eastern sea. The same book also mentions other dwarfs such as "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}", "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}", and "{{Nihongo|2=菌人}}" living in the east and south. The words "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}" and "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}" have the same pronunciation and etymology as {{Nihongo|2=侏儒}}, which is originally the same word.
== Wajinden == According to the [[Wajinden]]{{Quote frame|There is also a dwarf country in the south of it, the people are three or four feet long, to the queen more than 4,000 miles.}}
== [[Book of the Later Han]] == According to the [[Book of the Later Han]]{{Quote frame|More than 4,000 miles south of the Queen's country to Zhu Ru country, people are three or four feet long. From Zhu Ru southeast ship for a year, to the naked country, the black tooth country, so that the post transmission, the extreme is here.}}
== Main comparative sites ==
=== Tanegashima === {{Main|Tanegashima}} Many have identified [[Tanegashima]] with Shujukoku.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2">邪馬台国 [[石原洋三郎]] 令和元年10月 第一印刷P18-p23。</ref>。This is the result of a study of human bones excavated from Tanegashima Island from the Yayoi period to the Kofun period, with "extreme" short head, short head, and short stature characteristics<ref>種子島における古人骨形質の時代変化 竹中正巳 2009年。</ref> and that it is consistent with the anthropological characteristics of Shujukoku described in the [[wajinden]]. {{Citation needed span|This feature is not found in Okinawa, Kyushu, or Honshu, where human remains from the same period have been discovered, and "dwarf-like" adult human remains are found only on Tanegashima Island.|date=June 2022}}This is the reason why [[Tanegashima|Tanegashima Island]] is located in the south of Kyushu. [[Tanegashima]] is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some [[Yamatai Kyushu Theory|Yamatai Kyushu Theorists]] have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。
== References == {{Reflist}} <references group=""></references>
== See also ==
* {{ill|Shojin|lt=Shojin|ja|小人_(中国の伝説)}} * [[Sukunabikona]]、[[Issun-bōshi]] * [[Korpokkur]]

{{Short description|Historical country in Japan}} {{Contains special characters}} {{nihongo|Shujukoku|侏儒国|しゅじゅこく}} is a country of [[Dwarf (mythology)|dwarves]] thought to be located south of [[Yamatai]]koku, which appears in [[History of China|Ancient China]]'s [[Book of the Later Han]] and [[Records of the Three Kingdoms]]. In [[Records of the Three Kingdoms|Wei Zhi]]. It is mentioned together with [[Black tooth country]] and Naked country.
== Overview == The following are listed in Chinese history books. [[Book of the Later Han]] and the so-called [[Wajinden|Wajin Biography]] in [[Records of the Three Kingdoms]] state that it is located 4,000 miles south of the queen state of [[Wakoku|Wa-koku]].
The [[Classic of Mountains and Seas|Shanhai Jing]], a document that precedes the [[Wajinden]], mentions an island called {{ill|Shojin|lt=Shojin-koku|ja|小人_(中国の伝説)}} in the eastern sea. The same book also mentions other dwarfs such as "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}", "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}", and "{{Nihongo|2=菌人}}" living in the east and south. The words "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}" and "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}" have the same pronunciation and etymology as {{Nihongo|2=侏儒}}, which is originally the same word.
== Wajinden == According to the [[Wajinden]]{{Quote frame|There is also a dwarf country in the south of it, the people are three or four feet long, to the queen more than 4,000 miles.}}
== [[Book of the Later Han]] == According to the [[Book of the Later Han]]{{Quote frame|More than 4,000 miles south of the Queen's country to Zhu Ru country, people are three or four feet long. From Zhu Ru southeast ship for a year, to the naked country, the black tooth country, so that the post transmission, the extreme is here.}}

=== Tanegashima === {{Main|Tanegashima}} Many have identified [[Tanegashima]] with Shujukoku.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2">邪馬台国 [[石原洋三郎]] 令和元年10月 第一印刷P18-p23。</ref>。This is the result of a study of human bones excavated from Tanegashima Island from the Yayoi period to the Kofun period, with "extreme" short head, short head, and short stature characteristics<ref>種子島における古人骨形質の時代変化 竹中正巳 2009年。</ref> and that it is consistent with the anthropological characteristics of Shujukoku described in the [[wajinden]]. {{Citation needed span|This feature is not found in Okinawa, Kyushu, or Honshu, where human remains from the same period have been discovered, and "dwarf-like" adult human remains are found only on Tanegashima Island.|date=June 2022}}This is the reason why [[Tanegashima|Tanegashima Island]] is located in the south of Kyushu. [[Tanegashima]] is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some [[Yamatai Kyushu Theory|Yamatai Kyushu Theorists]] have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。

{{Short description|Historical country in Japan}} {{Contains special characters}} {{nihongo|Shujukoku|侏儒国|しゅじゅこく}} is a country of [[Dwarf (mythology)|dwarves]] thought to be located south of [[Yamatai]]koku, which appears in [[History of China|Ancient China]]'s [[Book of the Later Han]] and [[Records of the Three Kingdoms]]. In [[Records of the Three Kingdoms|Wei Zhi]]. It is mentioned together with [[Black tooth country]] and Naked country.
== Overview == The following are listed in Chinese history books. [[Book of the Later Han]] and the so-called [[Wajinden|Wajin Biography]] in [[Records of the Three Kingdoms]] state that it is located 4,000 miles south of the queen state of [[Wakoku|Wa-koku]].
The [[Classic of Mountains and Seas|Shanhai Jing]], a document that precedes the [[Wajinden]], mentions an island called {{ill|Shojin|lt=Shojin-koku|ja|小人_(中国の伝説)}} in the eastern sea. The same book also mentions other dwarfs such as "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}", "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}", and "{{Nihongo|2=菌人}}" living in the east and south. The words "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}" and "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}" have the same pronunciation and etymology as {{Nihongo|2=侏儒}}, which is originally the same word.
== Wajinden == According to the [[Wajinden]]{{Quote frame|There is also a dwarf country in the south of it, the people are three or four feet long, to the queen more than 4,000 miles.}}
== [[Book of the Later Han]] == According to the [[Book of the Later Han]]{{Quote frame|More than 4,000 miles south of the Queen's country to Zhu Ru country, people are three or four feet long. From Zhu Ru southeast ship for a year, to the naked country, the black tooth country, so that the post transmission, the extreme is here.}}
== Main comparative sites ==
=== Tanegashima === {{Main|Tanegashima}} Many have identified [[Tanegashima]] with Shujukoku.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2">邪馬台国 [[石原洋三郎]] 令和元年10月 第一印刷P18-p23。</ref>。This is the result of a study of human bones excavated from Tanegashima Island from the Yayoi period to the Kofun period, with "extreme" short head, short head, and short stature characteristics<ref>種子島における古人骨形質の時代変化 竹中正巳 2009年。</ref> and that it is consistent with the anthropological characteristics of Shujukoku described in the [[wajinden]]. {{Citation needed span|This feature is not found in Okinawa, Kyushu, or Honshu, where human remains from the same period have been discovered, and "dwarf-like" adult human remains are found only on Tanegashima Island.|date=June 2022}}This is the reason why [[Tanegashima|Tanegashima Island]] is located in the south of Kyushu. [[Tanegashima]] is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some [[Yamatai Kyushu Theory|Yamatai Kyushu Theorists]] have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。

{{Short description|Historical country in Japan}} {{Contains special characters}} {{nihongo|Shujukoku|侏儒国|しゅじゅこく}} is a country of [[Dwarf (mythology)|dwarves]] thought to be located south of [[Yamatai]]koku, which appears in [[History of China|Ancient China]]'s [[Book of the Later Han]] and [[Records of the Three Kingdoms]]. In [[Records of the Three Kingdoms|Wei Zhi]]. It is mentioned together with [[Black tooth country]] and Naked country.
== Overview == The following are listed in Chinese history books. [[Book of the Later Han]] and the so-called [[Wajinden|Wajin Biography]] in [[Records of the Three Kingdoms]] state that it is located 4,000 miles south of the queen state of [[Wakoku|Wa-koku]].
The [[Classic of Mountains and Seas|Shanhai Jing]], a document that precedes the [[Wajinden]], mentions an island called {{ill|Shojin|lt=Shojin-koku|ja|小人_(中国の伝説)}} in the eastern sea. The same book also mentions other dwarfs such as "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}", "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}", and "{{Nihongo|2=菌人}}" living in the east and south. The words "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}" and "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}" have the same pronunciation and etymology as {{Nihongo|2=侏儒}}, which is originally the same word.
== Wajinden == According to the [[Wajinden]]{{Quote frame|There is also a dwarf country in the south of it, the people are three or four feet long, to the queen more than 4,000 miles.}}
== [[Book of the Later Han]] == According to the [[Book of the Later Han]]{{Quote frame|More than 4,000 miles south of the Queen's country to Zhu Ru country, people are three or four feet long. From Zhu Ru southeast ship for a year, to the naked country, the black tooth country, so that the post transmission, the extreme is here.}}
== Main comparative sites ==
=== Tanegashima === {{Main|Tanegashima}} Many have identified [[Tanegashima]] with Shujukoku.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2">邪馬台国 [[石原洋三郎]] 令和元年10月 第一印刷P18-p23。</ref>。This is the result of a study of human bones excavated from Tanegashima Island from the Yayoi period to the Kofun period, with "extreme" short head, short head, and short stature characteristics<ref>種子島における古人骨形質の時代変化 竹中正巳 2009年。</ref> and that it is consistent with the anthropological characteristics of Shujukoku described in the [[wajinden]]. {{Citation needed span|This feature is not found in Okinawa, Kyushu, or Honshu, where human remains from the same period have been discovered, and "dwarf-like" adult human remains are found only on Tanegashima Island.|date=June 2022}}This is the reason why [[Tanegashima|Tanegashima Island]] is located in the south of Kyushu. [[Tanegashima]] is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some [[Yamatai Kyushu Theory|Yamatai Kyushu Theorists]] have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。

{{Short description|Historical country in Japan}} {{Contains special characters}} {{nihongo|Shujukoku|侏儒国|しゅじゅこく}} is a country of [[Dwarf (mythology)|dwarves]] thought to be located south of [[Yamatai]]koku, which appears in [[History of China|Ancient China]]'s [[Book of the Later Han]] and [[Records of the Three Kingdoms]]. In [[Records of the Three Kingdoms|Wei Zhi]]. It is mentioned together with [[Black tooth country]] and Naked country.
== Overview == The following are listed in Chinese history books. [[Book of the Later Han]] and the so-called [[Wajinden|Wajin Biography]] in [[Records of the Three Kingdoms]] state that it is located 4,000 miles south of the queen state of [[Wakoku|Wa-koku]].
The [[Classic of Mountains and Seas|Shanhai Jing]], a document that precedes the [[Wajinden]], mentions an island called {{ill|Shojin|lt=Shojin-koku|ja|小人_(中国の伝説)}} in the eastern sea. The same book also mentions other dwarfs such as "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}", "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}", and "{{Nihongo|2=菌人}}" living in the east and south. The words "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}" and "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}" have the same pronunciation and etymology as {{Nihongo|2=侏儒}}, which is originally the same word.
== Wajinden == According to the [[Wajinden]]{{Quote frame|There is also a dwarf country in the south of it, the people are three or four feet long, to the queen more than 4,000 miles.}}
== [[Book of the Later Han]] == According to the [[Book of the Later Han]]{{Quote frame|More than 4,000 miles south of the Queen's country to Zhu Ru country, people are three or four feet long. From Zhu Ru southeast ship for a year, to the naked country, the black tooth country, so that the post transmission, the extreme is here.}}
== Main comparative sites ==
=== Tanegashima === {{Main|Tanegashima}} Many have identified [[Tanegashima]] with Shujukoku.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2">邪馬台国 [[石原洋三郎]] 令和元年10月 第一印刷P18-p23。</ref>。This is the result of a study of human bones excavated from Tanegashima Island from the Yayoi period to the Kofun period, with "extreme" short head, short head, and short stature characteristics<ref>種子島における古人骨形質の時代変化 竹中正巳 2009年。</ref> and that it is consistent with the anthropological characteristics of Shujukoku described in the [[wajinden]]. {{Citation needed span|This feature is not found in Okinawa, Kyushu, or Honshu, where human remains from the same period have been discovered, and "dwarf-like" adult human remains are found only on Tanegashima Island.|date=June 2022}}This is the reason why [[Tanegashima|Tanegashima Island]] is located in the south of Kyushu. [[Tanegashima]] is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some [[Yamatai Kyushu Theory|Yamatai Kyushu Theorists]] have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。

{{Short description|Historical country in Japan}} {{Contains special characters}} {{nihongo|Shujukoku|侏儒国|しゅじゅこく}} is a country of [[Dwarf (mythology)|dwarves]] thought to be located south of [[Yamatai]]koku, which appears in [[History of China|Ancient China]]'s [[Book of the Later Han]] and [[Records of the Three Kingdoms]]. In [[Records of the Three Kingdoms|Wei Zhi]]. It is mentioned together with [[Black tooth country]] and Naked country.
== Overview == The following are listed in Chinese history books. [[Book of the Later Han]] and the so-called [[Wajinden|Wajin Biography]] in [[Records of the Three Kingdoms]] state that it is located 4,000 miles south of the queen state of [[Wakoku|Wa-koku]].
The [[Classic of Mountains and Seas|Shanhai Jing]], a document that precedes the [[Wajinden]], mentions an island called {{ill|Shojin|lt=Shojin-koku|ja|小人_(中国の伝説)}} in the eastern sea. The same book also mentions other dwarfs such as "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}", "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}", and "{{Nihongo|2=菌人}}" living in the east and south. The words "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}" and "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}" have the same pronunciation and etymology as {{Nihongo|2=侏儒}}, which is originally the same word.
== Wajinden == According to the [[Wajinden]]{{Quote frame|There is also a dwarf country in the south of it, the people are three or four feet long, to the queen more than 4,000 miles.}}
== [[Book of the Later Han]] == According to the [[Book of the Later Han]]{{Quote frame|More than 4,000 miles south of the Queen's country to Zhu Ru country, people are three or four feet long. From Zhu Ru southeast ship for a year, to the naked country, the black tooth country, so that the post transmission, the extreme is here.}}
== Main comparative sites ==
=== Tanegashima === {{Main|Tanegashima}} Many have identified [[Tanegashima]] with Shujukoku.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2">邪馬台国 [[石原洋三郎]] 令和元年10月 第一印刷P18-p23。</ref>。This is the result of a study of human bones excavated from Tanegashima Island from the Yayoi period to the Kofun period, with "extreme" short head, short head, and short stature characteristics<ref>種子島における古人骨形質の時代変化 竹中正巳 2009年。</ref> and that it is consistent with the anthropological characteristics of Shujukoku described in the [[wajinden]]. {{Citation needed span|This feature is not found in Okinawa, Kyushu, or Honshu, where human remains from the same period have been discovered, and "dwarf-like" adult human remains are found only on Tanegashima Island.|date=June 2022}}This is the reason why [[Tanegashima|Tanegashima Island]] is located in the south of Kyushu. [[Tanegashima]] is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some [[Yamatai Kyushu Theory|Yamatai Kyushu Theorists]] have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。
== References == {{Reflist}} <references group=""></references>
== See also ==
* {{ill|Shojin|lt=Shojin|ja|小人_(中国の伝説)}} * [[Sukunabikona]]、[[Issun-bōshi]] * [[Korpokkur]]

[[:en:Tanegashima|Tanegashima]] is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some [[:en:Yamatai Kyushu Theory|Yamatai Kyushu Theorists]] have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。

Wikidata name: Shujukoku
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:29, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{Short description|Historical country in Japan}}
{{Contains special characters}}
{{nihongo|Shujukoku|侏儒国|しゅじゅこく}} is a country of [[:en:Dwarf (mythology)|dwarves]] thought to be located south of [[:en:Yamatai|Yamatai]]koku, which appears in [[:en:History of China|Ancient China]]'s [[:en:Book of the Later Han|Book of the Later Han]] and [[:en:Records of the Three Kingdoms|Records of the Three Kingdoms]]. In [[:en:Records of the Three Kingdoms|Wei Zhi]]. It is mentioned together with [[:en:Black tooth country|Black tooth country]] and Naked country.

== Overview ==
The following are listed in Chinese history books. [[:en:Book of the Later Han|Book of the Later Han]] and the so-called [[:en:Wajinden|Wajin Biography]] in [[:en:Records of the Three Kingdoms|Records of the Three Kingdoms]] state that it is located 4,000 miles south of the queen state of [[:en:Wakoku|Wa-koku]].

The [[:en:Classic of Mountains and Seas|Shanhai Jing]], a document that precedes the [[:en:Wajinden|Wajinden]], mentions an island called {{ill|Shojin|lt=Shojin-koku|ja|小人_(中国の伝説)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shojin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=little people in Chinese mythology|WD=Q24897452}} in the eastern sea. The same book also mentions other dwarfs such as "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}", "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}", and "{{Nihongo|2=菌人}}" living in the east and south. The words "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}" and "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}" have the same pronunciation and etymology as {{Nihongo|2=侏儒}}, which is originally the same word.

== Wajinden ==
According to the [[:en:Wajinden|Wajinden]]{{Quote frame|There is also a dwarf country in the south of it, the people are three or four feet long, to the queen more than 4,000 miles.}}

== [[:en:Book of the Later Han|Book of the Later Han]] ==
According to the [[:en:Book of the Later Han|Book of the Later Han]]{{Quote frame|More than 4,000 miles south of the Queen's country to Zhu Ru country, people are three or four feet long. From Zhu Ru southeast ship for a year, to the naked country, the black tooth country, so that the post transmission, the extreme is here.}}

==  Main comparative sites  ==

=== Tanegashima ===
{{Main|Tanegashima}}
Many have identified [[:en:Tanegashima|Tanegashima]] with Shujukoku.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2">邪馬台国　[[石原洋三郎]]　令和元年10月　第一印刷P18-p23。</ref>。This is the result of a study of human bones excavated from Tanegashima Island from the Yayoi period to the Kofun period, with "extreme" short head, short head, and short stature characteristics<ref>種子島における古人骨形質の時代変化　竹中正巳　2009th year 。</ref> and that it is consistent with the anthropological characteristics of Shujukoku described in the [[:en:Wajinden|Wajinden]].
{{Citation needed span|This feature is not found in Okinawa, Kyushu, or Honshu, where human remains from the same period have been discovered, and "dwarf-like" adult human remains are found only on Tanegashima Island.|date=June 2022}}This is the reason why [[:en:Tanegashima|Tanegashima Island]] is located in the south of Kyushu.
[[:en:Tanegashima|Tanegashima]] is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some [[:en:Yamatai Kyushu Theory|Yamatai Kyushu Theorists]] have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。

{{Citation needed span|This feature is not found in Okinawa, Kyushu, or Honshu, where human remains from the same period have been discovered, and "dwarf-like" adult human remains are found only on Tanegashima Island.|date=June 2022}}This is the reason why [[:en:Tanegashima|Tanegashima Island]] is located in the south of Kyushu.
[[:en:Tanegashima|Tanegashima]] is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some [[:en:Yamatai Kyushu Theory|Yamatai Kyushu Theorists]] have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。

Wikidata name: Shujukoku
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:29, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{Short description|Historical country in Japan}}
{{Contains special characters}}
{{nihongo|Shujukoku|侏儒国|しゅじゅこく}} is a country of [[:en:Dwarf (mythology)|dwarves]] thought to be located south of [[:en:Yamatai|Yamatai]]koku, which appears in [[:en:History of China|Ancient China]]'s [[:en:Book of the Later Han|Book of the Later Han]] and [[:en:Records of the Three Kingdoms|Records of the Three Kingdoms]]. In [[:en:Records of the Three Kingdoms|Wei Zhi]]. It is mentioned together with [[:en:Black tooth country|Black tooth country]] and Naked country.

== Overview ==
The following are listed in Chinese history books. [[:en:Book of the Later Han|Book of the Later Han]] and the so-called [[:en:Wajinden|Wajin Biography]] in [[:en:Records of the Three Kingdoms|Records of the Three Kingdoms]] state that it is located 4,000 miles south of the queen state of [[:en:Wakoku|Wa-koku]].

The [[:en:Classic of Mountains and Seas|Shanhai Jing]], a document that precedes the [[:en:Wajinden|Wajinden]], mentions an island called {{ill|Shojin|lt=Shojin-koku|ja|小人_(中国の伝説)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shojin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=little people in Chinese mythology|WD=Q24897452}} in the eastern sea. The same book also mentions other dwarfs such as "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}", "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}", and "{{Nihongo|2=菌人}}" living in the east and south. The words "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}" and "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}" have the same pronunciation and etymology as {{Nihongo|2=侏儒}}, which is originally the same word.

== Wajinden ==
According to the [[:en:Wajinden|Wajinden]]{{Quote frame|There is also a dwarf country in the south of it, the people are three or four feet long, to the queen more than 4,000 miles.}}

== [[:en:Book of the Later Han|Book of the Later Han]] ==
According to the [[:en:Book of the Later Han|Book of the Later Han]]{{Quote frame|More than 4,000 miles south of the Queen's country to Zhu Ru country, people are three or four feet long. From Zhu Ru southeast ship for a year, to the naked country, the black tooth country, so that the post transmission, the extreme is here.}}

=== Tanegashima ===
{{Main|Tanegashima}}

{{Citation needed span|This feature is not found in Okinawa, Kyushu, or Honshu, where human remains from the same period have been discovered, and "dwarf-like" adult human remains are found only on Tanegashima Island.|date=June 2022}}This is the reason why [[:en:Tanegashima|Tanegashima Island]] is located in the south of Kyushu.
[[:en:Tanegashima|Tanegashima]] is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some [[:en:Yamatai Kyushu Theory|Yamatai Kyushu Theorists]] have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。

== [[:en:Book of the Later Han|Book of the Later Han]] == According to the [[:en:Book of the Later Han|Book of the Later Han]]{{Quote frame|More than 4,000 miles south of the Queen's country to Zhu Ru country, people are three or four feet long. From Zhu Ru southeast ship for a year, to the naked country, the black tooth country, so that the post transmission, the extreme is here.}}
== Main comparative sites ==
=== Tanegashima === {{Main|Tanegashima}} Many have identified [[:en:Tanegashima|Tanegashima]] with Shujukoku.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2">邪馬台国 [[石原洋三郎]] 令和元年10月 第一印刷P18-p23。</ref>。This is the result of a study of human bones excavated from Tanegashima Island from the Yayoi period to the Kofun period, with "extreme" short head, short head, and short stature characteristics<ref>種子島における古人骨形質の時代変化 竹中正巳 2009th year 。</ref> and that it is consistent with the anthropological characteristics of Shujukoku described in the [[:en:Wajinden|Wajinden]]. {{Citation needed span|This feature is not found in Okinawa, Kyushu, or Honshu, where human remains from the same period have been discovered, and "dwarf-like" adult human remains are found only on Tanegashima Island.|date=June 2022}}This is the reason why [[:en:Tanegashima|Tanegashima Island]] is located in the south of Kyushu. [[:en:Tanegashima|Tanegashima]] is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some [[:en:Yamatai Kyushu Theory|Yamatai Kyushu Theorists]] have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。

== See also ==

In [[:en:Records of the Three Kingdoms|Wei Zhi]]. It is mentioned together with [[:en:Black tooth country|Black tooth country]] and Naked country.
== Overview == The following are listed in Chinese history books. [[:en:Book of the Later Han|Book of the Later Han]] and the so-called [[:en:Wajinden|Wajin Biography]] in [[:en:Records of the Three Kingdoms|Records of the Three Kingdoms]] state that it is located 4,000 miles south of the queen state of [[:en:Wakoku|Wa-koku]].
The [[:en:Classic of Mountains and Seas|Shanhai Jing]], a document that precedes the [[:en:Wajinden|Wajinden]], mentions an island called {{ill|Shojin|lt=Shojin-koku|ja|小人_(中国の伝説)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shojin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=little people in Chinese mythology|WD=Q24897452}} in the eastern sea. The same book also mentions other dwarfs such as "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}", "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}", and "{{Nihongo|2=菌人}}" living in the east and south. The words "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}" and "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}" have the same pronunciation and etymology as {{Nihongo|2=侏儒}}, which is originally the same word.
== Wajinden == According to the [[:en:Wajinden|Wajinden]]{{Quote frame|There is also a dwarf country in the south of it, the people are three or four feet long, to the queen more than 4,000 miles.}}

From Zhu Ru southeast ship for a year, to the naked country, the black tooth country, so that the post transmission, the extreme is here.}}

[[:en:Tanegashima|Tanegashima]] is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some [[:en:Yamatai Kyushu Theory|Yamatai Kyushu Theorists]] have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。

== Wajinden == According to the [[:en:Wajinden|Wajinden]]{{Quote frame|There is also a dwarf country in the south of it, the people are three or four feet long, to the queen more than 4,000 miles.}}
== [[:en:Book of the Later Han|Book of the Later Han]] == According to the [[:en:Book of the Later Han|Book of the Later Han]]{{Quote frame|More than 4,000 miles south of the Queen's country to Zhu Ru country, people are three or four feet long. From Zhu Ru southeast ship for a year, to the naked country, the black tooth country, so that the post transmission, the extreme is here.}}
== Main comparative sites ==
=== Tanegashima === {{Main|Tanegashima}} Many have identified [[:en:Tanegashima|Tanegashima]] with Shujukoku.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2">邪馬台国 [[石原洋三郎]] 令和元年10月 第一印刷P18-p23。</ref>。This is the result of a study of human bones excavated from Tanegashima Island from the Yayoi period to the Kofun period, with "extreme" short head, short head, and short stature characteristics<ref>種子島における古人骨形質の時代変化 竹中正巳 2009th year 。</ref> and that it is consistent with the anthropological characteristics of Shujukoku described in the [[:en:Wajinden|Wajinden]]. {{Citation needed span|This feature is not found in Okinawa, Kyushu, or Honshu, where human remains from the same period have been discovered, and "dwarf-like" adult human remains are found only on Tanegashima Island.|date=June 2022}}This is the reason why [[:en:Tanegashima|Tanegashima Island]] is located in the south of Kyushu. [[:en:Tanegashima|Tanegashima]] is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some [[:en:Yamatai Kyushu Theory|Yamatai Kyushu Theorists]] have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。

The words "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}" and "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}" have the same pronunciation and etymology as {{Nihongo|2=侏儒}}, which is originally the same word.

== Wajinden == According to the [[:en:Wajinden|Wajinden]]{{Quote frame|There is also a dwarf country in the south of it, the people are three or four feet long, to the queen more than 4,000 miles.}}
== [[:en:Book of the Later Han|Book of the Later Han]] == According to the [[:en:Book of the Later Han|Book of the Later Han]]{{Quote frame|More than 4,000 miles south of the Queen's country to Zhu Ru country, people are three or four feet long. From Zhu Ru southeast ship for a year, to the naked country, the black tooth country, so that the post transmission, the extreme is here.}}
== Main comparative sites ==
=== Tanegashima === {{Main|Tanegashima}} Many have identified [[:en:Tanegashima|Tanegashima]] with Shujukoku.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2">邪馬台国 [[石原洋三郎]] 令和元年10月 第一印刷P18-p23。</ref>。This is the result of a study of human bones excavated from Tanegashima Island from the Yayoi period to the Kofun period, with "extreme" short head, short head, and short stature characteristics<ref>種子島における古人骨形質の時代変化 竹中正巳 2009th year 。</ref> and that it is consistent with the anthropological characteristics of Shujukoku described in the [[:en:Wajinden|Wajinden]]. {{Citation needed span|This feature is not found in Okinawa, Kyushu, or Honshu, where human remains from the same period have been discovered, and "dwarf-like" adult human remains are found only on Tanegashima Island.|date=June 2022}}This is the reason why [[:en:Tanegashima|Tanegashima Island]] is located in the south of Kyushu. [[:en:Tanegashima|Tanegashima]] is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some [[:en:Yamatai Kyushu Theory|Yamatai Kyushu Theorists]] have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。

== [[:en:Book of the Later Han|Book of the Later Han]] == According to the [[:en:Book of the Later Han|Book of the Later Han]]{{Quote frame|More than 4,000 miles south of the Queen's country to Zhu Ru country, people are three or four feet long. From Zhu Ru southeast ship for a year, to the naked country, the black tooth country, so that the post transmission, the extreme is here.}}
== Main comparative sites ==
=== Tanegashima === {{Main|Tanegashima}} Many have identified [[:en:Tanegashima|Tanegashima]] with Shujukoku.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2">邪馬台国 [[石原洋三郎]] 令和元年10月 第一印刷P18-p23。</ref>。This is the result of a study of human bones excavated from Tanegashima Island from the Yayoi period to the Kofun period, with "extreme" short head, short head, and short stature characteristics<ref>種子島における古人骨形質の時代変化 竹中正巳 2009th year 。</ref> and that it is consistent with the anthropological characteristics of Shujukoku described in the [[:en:Wajinden|Wajinden]]. {{Citation needed span|This feature is not found in Okinawa, Kyushu, or Honshu, where human remains from the same period have been discovered, and "dwarf-like" adult human remains are found only on Tanegashima Island.|date=June 2022}}This is the reason why [[:en:Tanegashima|Tanegashima Island]] is located in the south of Kyushu. [[:en:Tanegashima|Tanegashima]] is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some [[:en:Yamatai Kyushu Theory|Yamatai Kyushu Theorists]] have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。
== References == {{Reflist}} <references group=""></references>
== See also ==

In {{ill|Records of the Three Kingdoms|en|Records of the Three Kingdoms|WD=Q247318|lt=Wei Zhi}}. It is mentioned together with {{ill|Black tooth country|en|Black tooth country|WD=Q11179744|lt=Black tooth country}} and Naked country.
== Overview == The following are listed in Chinese history books. {{ill|Book of the Later Han|en|Book of the Later Han|WD=Q430428|lt=Book of the Later Han}} and the so-called {{ill|Wajinden|en|Wajinden|WD=Q1135798|lt=Wajin Biography}} in {{ill|Records of the Three Kingdoms|en|Records of the Three Kingdoms|WD=Q247318|lt=Records of the Three Kingdoms}} state that it is located 4,000 miles south of the queen state of {{ill|Wakoku|en|Wakoku|WD=Q10888424|lt=Wa-koku}}.
The {{ill|Classic of Mountains and Seas|en|Classic of Mountains and Seas|WD=Q844278|lt=Shanhai Jing}}, a document that precedes the {{ill|Wajinden|en|Wajinden|WD=Q1135798|lt=Wajinden}}, mentions an island called {{ill|Shojin|lt=Shojin-koku|ja|小人_(中国の伝説)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shojin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=little people in Chinese mythology|WD=Q24897452}} in the eastern sea. The same book also mentions other dwarfs such as "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}", "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}", and "{{Nihongo|2=菌人}}" living in the east and south. The words "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}" and "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}" have the same pronunciation and etymology as {{Nihongo|2=侏儒}}, which is originally the same word.
== Wajinden == According to the {{ill|Wajinden|en|Wajinden|WD=Q1135798|lt=Wajinden}}{{Quote frame|There is also a dwarf country in the south of it, the people are three or four feet long, to the queen more than 4,000 miles.}}

From Zhu Ru southeast ship for a year, to the naked country, the black tooth country, so that the post transmission, the extreme is here.}}

=== Tanegashima === {{Main|Tanegashima}} Many have identified {{ill|Tanegashima|en|Tanegashima|WD=Q696228|lt=Tanegashima}} with Shujukoku.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2">邪馬台国 [[石原洋三郎]] 令和元年10月 第一印刷P18-p23。</ref>。This is the result of a study of human bones excavated from Tanegashima Island from the Yayoi period to the Kofun period, with "extreme" short head, short head, and short stature characteristics<ref>種子島における古人骨形質の時代変化 竹中正巳 2009th year 。</ref> and that it is consistent with the anthropological characteristics of Shujukoku described in the {{ill|Wajinden|en|Wajinden|WD=Q1135798|lt=Wajinden}}. {{Citation needed span|This feature is not found in Okinawa, Kyushu, or Honshu, where human remains from the same period have been discovered, and "dwarf-like" adult human remains are found only on Tanegashima Island.|date=June 2022}}This is the reason why {{ill|Tanegashima|en|Tanegashima|WD=Q696228|lt=Tanegashima Island}} is located in the south of Kyushu. {{ill|Tanegashima|en|Tanegashima|WD=Q696228|lt=Tanegashima}} is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some {{ill|Yamatai Kyushu Theory|en|Yamatai Kyushu Theory|WD=Q11643035|lt=Yamatai Kyushu Theorists}} have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。
== References == {{Reflist}} <references group=""></references>
== See also ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Shujukoku]][[ja:侏儒国]][[zh:侏儒國]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Shujukoku]][[ja:侏儒国]][[zh:侏儒國]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Shujukoku]][[ja:侏儒国]][[zh:侏儒國]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q22123420]] Wikidata name: Shujukoku [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:29, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Short description|Historical country in Japan}} {{Contains special characters}} {{nihongo|Shujukoku|侏儒国|しゅじゅこく}} is a country of [[:en:Dwarf (mythology)|dwarves]] thought to be located south of {{ill|Yamatai|en|Yamatai|WD=Q844295|lt=Yamatai}}koku, which appears in {{ill|History of China|en|History of China|WD=Q82972|lt=Ancient China}}'s {{ill|Book of the Later Han|en|Book of the Later Han|WD=Q430428|lt=Book of the Later Han}} and {{ill|Records of the Three Kingdoms|en|Records of the Three Kingdoms|WD=Q247318|lt=Records of the Three Kingdoms}}. In {{ill|Records of the Three Kingdoms|en|Records of the Three Kingdoms|WD=Q247318|lt=Wei Zhi}}. It is mentioned together with {{ill|Black tooth country|en|Black tooth country|WD=Q11179744|lt=Black tooth country}} and Naked country.
== Overview == The following are listed in Chinese history books. {{ill|Book of the Later Han|en|Book of the Later Han|WD=Q430428|lt=Book of the Later Han}} and the so-called {{ill|Wajinden|en|Wajinden|WD=Q1135798|lt=Wajin Biography}} in {{ill|Records of the Three Kingdoms|en|Records of the Three Kingdoms|WD=Q247318|lt=Records of the Three Kingdoms}} state that it is located 4,000 miles south of the queen state of {{ill|Wakoku|en|Wakoku|WD=Q10888424|lt=Wa-koku}}.
The {{ill|Classic of Mountains and Seas|en|Classic of Mountains and Seas|WD=Q844278|lt=Shanhai Jing}}, a document that precedes the {{ill|Wajinden|en|Wajinden|WD=Q1135798|lt=Wajinden}}, mentions an island called {{ill|Shojin|lt=Shojin-koku|ja|小人_(中国の伝説)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shojin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=little people in Chinese mythology|WD=Q24897452}} in the eastern sea. The same book also mentions other dwarfs such as "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}", "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}", and "{{Nihongo|2=菌人}}" living in the east and south. The words "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}" and "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}" have the same pronunciation and etymology as {{Nihongo|2=侏儒}}, which is originally the same word.
== Wajinden == According to the {{ill|Wajinden|en|Wajinden|WD=Q1135798|lt=Wajinden}}{{Quote frame|There is also a dwarf country in the south of it, the people are three or four feet long, to the queen more than 4,000 miles.}}
== {{ill|Book of the Later Han|en|Book of the Later Han|WD=Q430428|lt=Book of the Later Han}} == According to the {{ill|Book of the Later Han|en|Book of the Later Han|WD=Q430428|lt=Book of the Later Han}}{{Quote frame|More than 4,000 miles south of the Queen's country to Zhu Ru country, people are three or four feet long. From Zhu Ru southeast ship for a year, to the naked country, the black tooth country, so that the post transmission, the extreme is here.}}
== Main comparative sites ==
=== Tanegashima === {{Main|Tanegashima}} Many have identified {{ill|Tanegashima|en|Tanegashima|WD=Q696228|lt=Tanegashima}} with Shujukoku.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2">邪馬台国 [[石原洋三郎]] 令和元年10月 第一印刷P18-p23。</ref>。This is the result of a study of human bones excavated from Tanegashima Island from the Yayoi period to the Kofun period, with "extreme" short head, short head, and short stature characteristics<ref>種子島における古人骨形質の時代変化 竹中正巳 2009th year 。</ref> and that it is consistent with the anthropological characteristics of Shujukoku described in the {{ill|Wajinden|en|Wajinden|WD=Q1135798|lt=Wajinden}}. {{Citation needed span|This feature is not found in Okinawa, Kyushu, or Honshu, where human remains from the same period have been discovered, and "dwarf-like" adult human remains are found only on Tanegashima Island.|date=June 2022}}This is the reason why {{ill|Tanegashima|en|Tanegashima|WD=Q696228|lt=Tanegashima Island}} is located in the south of Kyushu. {{ill|Tanegashima|en|Tanegashima|WD=Q696228|lt=Tanegashima}} is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some {{ill|Yamatai Kyushu Theory|en|Yamatai Kyushu Theory|WD=Q11643035|lt=Yamatai Kyushu Theorists}} have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。

=== Tanegashima === {{Main|Tanegashima}} Many have identified {{ill|Tanegashima|en|Tanegashima|WD=Q696228|lt=Tanegashima|1=Tanegashima}} with Shujukoku.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2">邪馬台国 [[石原洋三郎]] 令和元年10月 第一印刷P18-p23。</ref>。This is the result of a study of human bones excavated from Tanegashima Island from the Yayoi period to the Kofun period, with "extreme" short head, short head, and short stature characteristics<ref>種子島における古人骨形質の時代変化 竹中正巳 2009th year 。</ref> and that it is consistent with the anthropological characteristics of Shujukoku described in the {{ill|Wajinden|en|Wajinden|WD=Q1135798|lt=Wajinden|1=Wajinden}}. {{Citation needed span|This feature is not found in Okinawa, Kyushu, or Honshu, where human remains from the same period have been discovered, and "dwarf-like" adult human remains are found only on Tanegashima Island.|date=June 2022}}This is the reason why {{ill|Tanegashima|en|Tanegashima|WD=Q696228|lt=Tanegashima Island|1=Tanegashima}} is located in the south of Kyushu. {{ill|Tanegashima|en|Tanegashima|WD=Q696228|lt=Tanegashima|1=Tanegashima}} is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some {{ill|Yamatai Kyushu Theory|en|Yamatai Kyushu Theory|WD=Q11643035|lt=Yamatai Kyushu Theorists|1=Yamatai Kyushu Theory}} have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。
== References == {{Reflist}} <references group=""></references>

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Shujukoku]][[ja:侏儒国]][[zh:侏儒國]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Shujukoku]][[ja:侏儒国]][[zh:侏儒國]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Shujukoku]][[ja:侏儒国]][[zh:侏儒國]]
{{Short description|Historical country in Japan}} {{Contains special characters}} {{nihongo|Shujukoku|侏儒国|しゅじゅこく}} is a country of [[:en:Dwarf (mythology)|dwarves]] thought to be located south of {{ill|Yamatai|en|Yamatai|WD=Q844295|lt=Yamatai|1=Yamatai}}koku, which appears in {{ill|History of China|en|History of China|WD=Q82972|lt=Ancient China|1=History of China}}'s {{ill|Book of the Later Han|en|Book of the Later Han|WD=Q430428|lt=Book of the Later Han|1=Book of the Later Han}} and {{ill|Records of the Three Kingdoms|en|Records of the Three Kingdoms|WD=Q247318|lt=Records of the Three Kingdoms|1=Records of the Three Kingdoms}}. In {{ill|Records of the Three Kingdoms|en|Records of the Three Kingdoms|WD=Q247318|lt=Wei Zhi|1=Records of the Three Kingdoms}}. It is mentioned together with {{ill|Black tooth country|en|Black tooth country|WD=Q11179744|lt=Black tooth country|1=Black tooth country}} and Naked country.
== Overview == The following are listed in Chinese history books. {{ill|Book of the Later Han|en|Book of the Later Han|WD=Q430428|lt=Book of the Later Han|1=Book of the Later Han}} and the so-called {{ill|Wajinden|en|Wajinden|WD=Q1135798|lt=Wajin Biography|1=Wajinden}} in {{ill|Records of the Three Kingdoms|en|Records of the Three Kingdoms|WD=Q247318|lt=Records of the Three Kingdoms|1=Records of the Three Kingdoms}} state that it is located 4,000 miles south of the queen state of {{ill|Wakoku|en|Wakoku|WD=Q10888424|lt=Wa-koku|1=Wakoku}}.
The {{ill|Classic of Mountains and Seas|en|Classic of Mountains and Seas|WD=Q844278|lt=Shanhai Jing|1=Classic of Mountains and Seas}}, a document that precedes the {{ill|Wajinden|en|Wajinden|WD=Q1135798|lt=Wajinden|1=Wajinden}}, mentions an island called {{ill|Shojin|lt=Shojin-koku|ja|小人_(中国の伝説)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shojin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Shojin|WD=Q24897452}} in the eastern sea. The same book also mentions other dwarfs such as "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}", "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}", and "{{Nihongo|2=菌人}}" living in the east and south. The words "{{Nihongo|2=焦僥}}" and "{{Nihongo|2=周饒}}" have the same pronunciation and etymology as {{Nihongo|2=侏儒}}, which is originally the same word.
== Wajinden == According to the {{ill|Wajinden|en|Wajinden|WD=Q1135798|lt=Wajinden|1=Wajinden}}{{Quote frame|There is also a dwarf country in the south of it, the people are three or four feet long, to the queen more than 4,000 miles.}}
== {{ill|Book of the Later Han|en|Book of the Later Han|WD=Q430428|lt=Book of the Later Han|1=Book of the Later Han}} == According to the {{ill|Book of the Later Han|en|Book of the Later Han|WD=Q430428|lt=Book of the Later Han|1=Book of the Later Han}}{{Quote frame|More than 4,000 miles south of the Queen's country to Zhu Ru country, people are three or four feet long. From Zhu Ru southeast ship for a year, to the naked country, the black tooth country, so that the post transmission, the extreme is here.}}
== Main comparative sites ==
=== Tanegashima === {{Main|Tanegashima}} Many have identified {{ill|Tanegashima|en|Tanegashima|WD=Q696228|lt=Tanegashima|1=Tanegashima}} with Shujukoku.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2">邪馬台国 [[石原洋三郎]] 令和元年10月 第一印刷P18-p23。</ref>。This is the result of a study of human bones excavated from Tanegashima Island from the Yayoi period to the Kofun period, with "extreme" short head, short head, and short stature characteristics<ref>種子島における古人骨形質の時代変化 竹中正巳 2009th year 。</ref> and that it is consistent with the anthropological characteristics of Shujukoku described in the {{ill|Wajinden|en|Wajinden|WD=Q1135798|lt=Wajinden|1=Wajinden}}. {{Citation needed span|This feature is not found in Okinawa, Kyushu, or Honshu, where human remains from the same period have been discovered, and "dwarf-like" adult human remains are found only on Tanegashima Island.|date=June 2022}}This is the reason why {{ill|Tanegashima|en|Tanegashima|WD=Q696228|lt=Tanegashima Island|1=Tanegashima}} is located in the south of Kyushu. {{ill|Tanegashima|en|Tanegashima|WD=Q696228|lt=Tanegashima|1=Tanegashima}} is located about 4,000 ri south of northern Kyushu, which is about 4,000 ri in the shortest sense of the word, so some {{ill|Yamatai Kyushu Theory|en|Yamatai Kyushu Theory|WD=Q11643035|lt=Yamatai Kyushu Theorists|1=Yamatai Kyushu Theory}} have compared the country to Tanegashima.<ref name="邪馬台国-石原洋三郎-令和元年10月-第一印刷p18-2" />。
